form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Not raced for 36 days. Last start raced on speed throughout then finished second of 11 runners at Saint Brieuc on March 1 over 3800m, 12 len behind Musistar carrying 65kg. At only start last preparation set the pace for much of the race finished second of 14 starters at Machecoul on November 11 over 2950m, on slow going 1.0 len behind Mac Emery with 61.5kg. Another bold showing likely.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Freshened for 31 days. Last outing finished seventh of 12 starters at Argentan on March 6 over 3600m, slow track; 13 len behind Raffles Princess carrying 67kg at $17. Race before finished fourth of 14 runners at Angers on February 12 over 3400m, 10 len behind Millares with 63kg at $78. Must be a chance in this scenario.

form.formComment: Jumped when unwanted in the market at debut, finished ninth of 14 starters at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3550m, on slow going 24 len behind Fiumiccino carrying 62.5kg at $87. Expected to improve but prefer to see again.

form.formComment: Racing second-up. First race start finished tenth of 14 starters at Saint-Cloud on September 12 over 3100m, on slow going 22 len behind Kando with 53kg at $15. Returned from break made some head-way from midfield; finished seventh of 10 runners at Auteuil on March 7 over 3500m, slow track; 32 len behind Millares with 66kg at $41. Watch for sharp improvement.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after seven months finished 12th of 14 runners at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 3550m, on slow going 38 len behind Fiumiccino with 64kg at $72. Previously second-up pulled up at Vittel on August 17 over 3300m. In the mix on best and gets chance to atone.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, made ground from midfield; finished ninth of 12 runners at Fontainebleau on March 29 over 3550m, on slow going 18 len behind Stecaster with 66kg at $29. On a quick back-up here and looks to have work cut out again.

form.formComment: She is resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Auteuil November 23 over 3500m. First ever start ran didn't finish the race at Craon September 29 over 3000m. Prefer to watch first up.
